name: Lycopodium Limited
analysis: LYL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 0% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$16.8600. Trade idea: entry A$18.4600, stop A$14.9886, target A$28.8742 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
